title: stenotus armerioides var. armerioides
intro: Stenotus armerioides var. armerioides, also known as mountain sneezeweed or western sneezeweed, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to the western United States and Canada. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily as a treatment for respiratory issues, including colds, flu, and allergies, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and promoting expectoration. In herbal preparations, Stenotus armerioides var. armerioides is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to help alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
